headlines.description: — Will Riley scored 20 points, Sharife Cooper added 18 and the Washington Wizards upset the Eastern Conference-leading Detroit Pistons 126-117 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Riley, Cooper lead undermanned Wizards past Pistons, 126-117

headlines.description: — Jalen Suggs had 15 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his first career triple-double, Desmond Bane scored 23 points and Paolo Banchero added 22 to lead the Orlando Magic to a 118-98 win over the Brooklyn Nets on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Suggs' first career triple-double leads Magic to 118-98 win over Nets

headlines.shortLinkText: Wembanyama scores 29 points as Spurs beat Mavs despite another 30-plus night from Cooper Flagg

headlines.shortLinkText: Austin Reaves scores 35, Lakers overcome Luka's injury departure for 119-115 win over Sixers
